THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 29, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 27, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-29-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. ON JULY 29, 2013, THE COURT ORDERED THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND PLEADING UNDER ATTACK PER SF LOCAL RULES 2.6B AND 2.6C. THE COURT WARNED THE MOVING PARTY THAT THE FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER WOULD RESULT IN THE DEMURRER BEING OVERRULED. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER. THE MOVING PARTY WAS FIRST ORDERED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS ON JUNE 27, 2013, WHEN THE MATTER WAS FIRST SET FOR HEARING AND THEN CONTINUED FOR COURTESY COPIES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT -
The demurrer to answer to second amended complaint is overruled. On July 29, 2013, the Court ordered the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers and pleading under attack per SF Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C. The Court warned the moving party that the failure to comply with the Court's order would result in the demurrer being overruled. The moving party failed to comply with the Court's order. The moving party was first ordered to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers on June 27, 2013, when the matter was first set for hearing and then continued for courtesy copies. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TRUCK INSURANCE EXCHANGE's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to September 9, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Moving party is given one last opportunity to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and operative pleadings to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 29, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
